section_name: Integration of Plans and Policy Efforts
text:
In developing each of its transportation plans and policy efforts, the department must:

(1) clearly reference the statewide transportation plan under Section 201.601 (Statewide Transportation Plan) ;

(2) include in the plan or policy effort the transportation system strategies, goals and measurable targets, and other related performance measures established under Section 201.601 (Statewide Transportation Plan) (a-1)(1); and

(3) specify how the plan or policy effort supports the specific goals established under Section 201.601 (Statewide Transportation Plan) (a-1)(1).
markdown:
# Transp. Code
## Title 6
### Chapter 201. Gen. Provisions & Admin.
##### § 201.6015 — Integration of Plans and Policy Efforts

In developing each of its transportation plans and policy efforts, the department must:

    (1) clearly reference the statewide transportation plan under Section 201.601 (Statewide Transportation Plan) ;

    (2) include in the plan or policy effort the transportation system strategies, goals and measurable targets, and other related performance measures established under Section 201.601 (Statewide Transportation Plan) (a-1)(1); and

    (3) specify how the plan or policy effort supports the specific goals established under Section 201.601 (Statewide Transportation Plan) (a-1)(1).

*Acts 2017, 85th Leg., R.S., Ch. 533 (S.B.312), Sec. 6, eff. September 1, 2017.*
